name: Chase Ultimate Rewards
note: Best value transferring to airline/hotel partners or booking travel through the Chase portal (Sapphire Reserve/Preferred or Ink Business Preferred cardholders get the boosted portal rate).

name: Amex Membership Rewards
note: Best value transferring to airline/hotel partners; Pay With Points and Amex Travel redemptions run well below that.

name: Southwest Rapid Rewards
note: No cash-out option; value here reflects typical redemption for Southwest flights. Used to discount points-denominated card credits (e.g. anniversary point bonuses) to real dollars.

name: Wyndham Rewards
note: Fixed-category hotel award chart; conservative per-point estimate. Used to discount points-denominated card credits to real dollars.

name: United MileagePlus
note: Conservative per-mile estimate for United award redemptions. Used to discount points-denominated card credits to real dollars.

name: JetBlue TrueBlue
note: Revenue-based program; per-point estimate for typical JetBlue redemptions. Used to discount points-denominated card credits to real dollars.
